signals.headline: Bitcoin Price Plunges 50% from October 2025 Peak Toward $60,000 Amid Massive Liquidations | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Price Plunges 50% from October 2025 Peak Toward $60,000 Amid Massive Liquidations | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Bitcoin has crashed through key support levels to around $64,000 as of Thursday, down nearly 50% from its October 6, 2025, high above $126,000, marking one of its largest historical drawdowns.[1][2]  
Over $1.1 billion in leveraged long positions were liquidated in the past 24 hours

signals.headline: Cooper Flagg surges to ROY favorite after 45-pt near triple-double vs
signals.raw:
Cooper Flagg surges to ROY favorite after 45-pt near triple-double vs. Lakers** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][3][4]

Flagg passed Kon Knueppel in DraftKings ROY odds (-250 initially, now -150) following his 45 points, 9 assists, 8 rebounds in Sunday's Mavericks win over the Lakers, plus a prior 51-pt game, marking a historic teen rookie stretch and shifting prediction markets significantly[1]
